underlying_goal: Build and iterate on the AuExpert pet health mobile app, implementing core features like diary media uploads, health records, AI classification, and UI improvements
friction_detail: Supabase migration conflicts from missing columns/conflicting schemas, connection string issues with special characters, Metro port conflicts, and Edge Function JWT auth problems required workarounds.
brief_summary: User spent ~10 hours building out the AuExpert pet health app across many features (media uploads, health records, AI diary classification, UI fixes), achieving most goals but hitting friction with Supabase migrations and environment issues toward the end.
